title: New Grad Software Engineer Jobs
tagline: Entry-level software engineering, data, and security roles in the United States. No senior titles, no internships. Built for people applying to their first full-time role.
description: New grad software engineer jobs in the US, updated daily. Entry-level SWE, data, and security roles with salaries, pulled from 400,000+ crawled listings.
keywords: entry-level software engineering, data, and security roles in the United States

Remote Tech Jobs: fully remote engineering roles
AI and ML Jobs: AI-first roles, classified daily

faq.q: How often is this list updated?
faq.a: Once a day. A GitHub Action pulls new entry-level listings from Dreamwork's public API, which crawls company career pages directly (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, and others). Use <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>F</kbd> to search for backend, frontend, full-stack, mobile, embedded, DevOps, or security roles.

faq.q: What counts as a new grad job here?
faq.a: Roles classified as junior in engineering, data, or security. Senior, staff, and management titles are filtered out, and so are internships, which have their own list. Most roles fit 2025 to 2027 graduates in CS and related fields.

faq.q: Where does the salary data come from?
faq.a: From the postings themselves. Many US listings disclose a range because of pay-transparency laws. When a posting does not state pay, the column is blank. Nothing is estimated.

faq.q: Can a tool apply to these for me?
faq.a: Yes. Dreamwork matches your resume against every listing here, tailors each application, and can submit them for you. Seeing your matches is free.
